title: pterocarpus heyneanus
intro: Pterocarpus heyneanus, also known as the Vengai tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly found in tropical forests. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pterocarpus heyneanus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and wounds. Pterocarpus heyneanus is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or ointment, and is traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments.
